emails.subject: Frost Securities Inc. account with ECT Investments, Inc.
emails.subject_base: Frost Securities Inc. account with ECT Investments, Inc.
emails.body: Frost Securities Inc. account with ECT Investments, Inc. Sheila: I received a requst from you. Please advise if: (1) You sent explanation to Ted Murphy stating purpose for account. (2) Agreement reflect DB Alex Brown LLC to clear trades with prime broker of our choice (3) Why is this a Deutsche Bank agreement? Who is "Frost Securities, Inc."? (4) Do we contact "Janet" at 214/515-4495 with markup?

emails.body: Sara, Purpose of Account includes rationale (see below), I have added Ted as a C= C:=20 on our top page request=20 Deutsche Banc Alex Brown is the back office service utilized by Frost=20 Securites, Inc to clear their trades. When we execute through Frost they u= se=20 DB Alex Brown to settle the trade with our prime Broker. 3. 2000 Petroleum Analyst Yearbook Frost Securities Inc.=20 Lewis W. Kreps=20 R. Lewis Ropp=20 Gary L. Russell Frost Securities Inc. 2727 N. Harwood St., Ste. 1000 Dallas, Texas 75201-1515 Phone: 214-515-4400 Fax: 214-515-4430 Contact: Lewis W. Kreps E-mail: lewis.kreps@frostsecurities.com Frost Securities, Inc. is a Dallas-based full-service=20 investment banking firm focused on equity research, institutional brokerage= =20 and trading and corporate finance. The firm is a wholly owned subsidiary of=20 Cullen/Frost Bankers (NYSE: CFR). Frost Securities, Inc. is leading th= e=20 charge to service companies and industries of the Southwest with an= =20 emphasis on the energy and technology sectors. The company=01,s effor= t is=20 "research led" and "trading driven," with multiple analysts per sector.= =20 The firm=01,s research team averages more than 10 years of direct industry=20 experience in their respective industries. The firm=01,s corporate finance gr= oup=20 consists of seasoned professionals with an in-depth understanding of= =20 public offerings, private placements, leveraged buyouts, M&A advisory, sale= =20 advisory and takeover defenses.=20 4. Janet is the contact for Frost. Pleae call=20 Date: May 19, 2000
